calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Title To Property
Off Calendar Jun-11-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Stacy Stecher for Bonnie Basso.

The Court stated that this is on because the Probate Examiner has been requesting legal authority to supporting the petition. Ms. Stecher stated that when she first filed the petition she was not aware that there was no schedule of assets, or writing, or deed indicating intent to transfer the property, and that she reached out to the Examiner with an e-mail, but did not hear back from him. Ms. Stecher also stated that they have language in the trust with respect to all of their real property, and that she believes it falls within intent and the meaning of heggstad, but she will withdraw her petition and proceed with probate. The Petition for Order Confirming Title to Property is off calendar without prejudice to filing of a separate matter in probate.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
